response.original_title: 私の好きって気持ち...受け取って！週に1度とは言わず、長く甘い口づけを交わして、温度も確かめて。何度も何度も放課後レズで溶け合う2人の秘密。
response.overview: In the classroom, Kitaoka and Shishido belong to different groups and social classes, with no apparent point of contact. Yet they share a secret hidden from everyone that takes place after the final bell:  buying a classmate once a week, the five-thousand-yen excuse. They long to discover even the most hidden moles. Intense deep kisses intertwining saliva. A youthful sixty-nine where they taste each other's love juices. Exchanging sweet, prolonged kisses, they confirm their love in libraries and hallways alike. Shells joining where hearts connect. Licking legs and each other's clitoris. A fleeting, phantom-like lesbian moment.
response.title: Watashi no suki tte kimochi...uketotte! Shuu ni 1-do to wa iwazu, nagaku amai kuchizuke wo kawashite, ondo mo tashikamete. Nandomo nandomo houkago rezu de tokeau futari no himitsu.

titles.title: Watashi no suki tte kimochi...uketotte! Shū ni 1-do to wa iwazu, nagaku amai kuchizuke wo kawashite, ondo mo tashikamete. Nandomo nandomo hōkago rezu de tokeau futari no himitsu.
